projects.name: chickenscratch-core
projects.role: The engine - only code that reads/writes the .chikn format; git revisions; Pandoc compile (ADR-001)

projects.name: chikn-converter
projects.role: Scrivener <-> .chikn converter CLI; calls the engine, hosts the Scrivener parsing code

projects.name: chickenscratch
projects.role: Tauri backend - thin commands over the engine, plus app services (settings, keyring, AI)

projects.name: ui (npm)
projects.role: React + TipTap frontend; the reference GUI with src-tauri (ADR-003)

verification.status_note: Root Cargo.toml still lists the deleted linux/ directory as a workspace member, so all cargo commands fail on master (verified 2026-06-10). Commands below are the declared suite from docs/AGENT-WORKFLOW.md and apply as soon as the workspace manifest is fixed.
commands: cd ui && npm run lint && npm run build

conditional_commands.release: scripts/check-release-metadata.sh and RELEASE.md runbook (both currently reference deleted native trees - see .agents/state.md drift register)

policy.code_changes: Run the suite for touched areas before claiming completion (Invariant I9).
policy.docs_only: Code verification not required unless docs affect setup, commands, runtime behavior, generated files, or user-visible behavior.
policy.manual_behavior: Run the relevant manual check or smoke test for behavior not covered by automation, or state clearly that it was not run.

notes: AGENTS.md (June 7 protocol) is canonical; docs/adr/ is the decision log; .agents/decisions.md is a pointer stub.
REVIEW.md and .review/ are the audit record of a completed 63-finding review cycle - history, not state.
scripts/check-release-metadata.sh requires REVIEW.md to stay export-ignored in .gitattributes; never delete or rename REVIEW.md.
macos/, windows/, linux/ native trees were deleted 2026-06-07 (ADR-004); CI and release scripts still reference them - drift register in .agents/state.md.
